description_long: This is a tall, slender floor lamp with a minimalist design, featuring a dome-shaped lampshade at the top and a thin, straight pole connecting to a flat, circular base. The lampshade is a solid, dark color and appears to be made of metal, with a small central opening for the light source. The pole is also dark and metallic, giving the lamp a sleek, modern appearance. The base is wide enough to provide stability, matching the color and material of the shade and pole. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian and contemporary style. The lamp is suitable for urban environments such as living rooms, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, minimalist floor lamp with a dome-shaped metal shade, thin pole, and flat circular base in a dark color. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dome-shaped shade, straight pole, and circular base, all in a dark color.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same dome shade and thin pole visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the dome shade and pole aligned centrally above the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the same silhouette with no additional features visible.
